mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (application_case_id, mode, started_at, total_score, report) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{mode}, #{startedAt}, #{totalScore}, #{report})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0) AS total_questions, COALESCE(progress.answered_questions, 0) AS answered_questions, (COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(progress.answered_questions, 0) = COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0)) AS finished, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(a.score)) FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = s.id AND a.score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_answer_score, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.score)) FROM interview_media_analysis m WHERE m.interview_session_id = s.id AND m.kind = 'VOICE') AS avg_voice_score FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT q.interview_session_id, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN q.id END) AS answered_questions FROM interview_question q LEFT JOIN interview_answer a ON a.question_id = q.id GROUP BY q.interview_session_id ) progress ON progress.interview_session_id = s.id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(s.last_resumed_at, s.created_at) DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id SET s.deleted_at = NOW() WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id SET s.last_resumed_at = NOW() WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT total_score FROM interview_session WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} AND total_score IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND id <> #{excludeSessionId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_question (interview_session_id, parent_question_id, question, question_type, sort_order) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{parentQuestionId}, #{question}, #{questionType}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT q.* FROM interview_question q LEFT JOIN interview_question p ON p.id = q.parent_question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY COALESCE(p.sort_order, q.sort_order), (q.parent_question_id IS NOT NULL), q.sort_order, q.id

SELECT q.* FROM interview_question q JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE q.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_answer (question_id, answer_text, audio_url, video_url, score, feedback, improved_answer) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{answerText}, #{audioUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{score}, #{feedback}, #{improvedAnswer})
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY q.sort_order, a.id
SELECT * FROM interview_answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.* FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_answer SET audio_url = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_answer SET video_url = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (user_id, application_case_id, feature_type, status, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, credit_used, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{featureType}, #{status}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{creditUsed}, #{errorMessage})

INSERT INTO interview_agent_step (interview_session_id, question_id, step_no, agent, action, status, summary, detail, elapsed_ms) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{questionId}, #{stepNo}, #{agent}, #{action}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{detail}, #{elapsedMs})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM interview_agent_step WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id
